title: Product Marketing Manager
required_skills: 5+ years Product Marketing experience in SaaS
Product launch positioning messaging pricing packaging
Omnichannel marketing campaign planning and optimization
Analytical mindset with data and experimentation
Cross-functional collaboration Product Growth Sales CS
Partnership with Product Managers on roadmap and GTM
matched_skills: Data analysis Power BI Looker Studio
missing_skills: B2C product marketing direct end-user consumer audience
Growth experimentation A/B testing acquisition activation retention
Product Manager collaboration on roadmap prioritization
core_responsibilities: Own positioning messaging and narrative for Reusable Identity (Reusable KYC and Sumsub ID)
Lead go-to-market strategy and execution for B2B and B2C audiences
Drive growth and adoption via rapid experiments across acquisition activation and retention
Conduct continuous market and customer research for strategy and competitive positioning
Plan and optimize multichannel marketing campaigns with Brand and Creative
recommended_emphasis: Highlight SaaS-adjacent product experience (FinTech IoT platforms with subscription or API-based models)
Emphasize B2C or mixed B2B2C campaign work from Moli Media (e-commerce KOL partnerships end-user acquisition)
Showcase ROI analysis and data-driven decision making using Power BI and Looker Studio
Quantify GTM results: CNY 4.6M signed contracts and 100+ B2B clients
Frame cross-functional collaboration explicitly around Product Sales Customer Success alignment
Demonstrate experimentation mindset: campaign iteration funnel optimization
Stress hands-on end-to-end ownership of product marketing workstreams
